title: F-4U Corsair Fighter Plastic Model - World War II Classic Fighter Model, 1:48 Military Enthusiasts Plastic Fighter Assembly Model (Silvery)
features: 【F-4U Corsair Fighter Plastic Model Kit】: The F-4U Corsair Fighter is considered the fastest piston fighter during World War II. This model kit is accurately replicated in 1:48 glass, making it the perfect gift for military enthusiasts.

【Easy to assemble】: This model can be directly assembled without the need for glue; It is also equipped with exquisite water sticker patterns, making the assembled model more vivid and realistic, allowing you to enjoy the great pleasure of creating your own The F-4U Corsair Fighter.

【Components are movable】: After successful assembly, the propeller of the model can rotate, the cockpit can be opened and closed, the wingspan can reach 22 centimeters, and the landing gear can be lowered and retracted.

【High quality materials】:This model kit is made of high-quality plastic, which is durable and features prominent details. It can be placed in your living room or study for people to enjoy and play with.
【Specifications and Dimensions】: Length: 8.66 inches, width: 7.09 inches; Packaging box length: 8.66 inches, width 5 inches.

【Perfect Gift for Military Enthusiasts and Amateur Enthusiasts】Whether you are a military enthusiast or an airplane model collector, this F4U Corsair fighter model is the perfect gift. Dive into the history of aerial combat and add a nostalgic touch of World War II to your collection.
